questions.question:
A Deployment named `reporting-api` in namespace `qos-lab` is unschedulable because its resource requests and limits are wrong.

Fix the workload so that:
- `requests.cpu` is `250m`
- `requests.memory` is `256Mi`
- `limits.cpu` is `250m`
- `limits.memory` is `256Mi`
- the Deployment becomes Available
- the running Pod has QoS class `Guaranteed`

Do not replace the workload. Repair the Deployment resource configuration in place.

verification.description: Deployment reporting-api uses the intended requests and limits
Deployment reporting-api becomes Available after the resource repair
The running Pod reports QoS class Guaranteed
